title: PARENT-ACTIVITY (15s) — Papa+Sara+Eva sandcastle research base build (locked positions)
prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show family-comedy shot on @beach-shore — dry golden sand, soft sunny afternoon light. There are EXACTLY 3 people in the entire frame — no extra adults, no extra children, no background figures, no ghost extras. POSITION LOCK — every character stays in their EXACT same physical kneeling spot from second 0 through second 15. No character ever stands up, walks, crosses to another spot, reaches across to another character, or changes position. Only arms move in place; bodies, knees, and head positions stay locked. There are exactly THREE people in the entire frame: one Papa, one Sara, one Eva. The partly-built @sandcastle-research-base is CENTER-FRAME with low walls and a half-moat — close enough to ALL THREE characters that each can softly pat sand without reaching across other characters. @Papa already kneeling on both knees in the sand on the LEFT side directly beside the castle, both hands softly patting sand into the wall in front of him. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible at all times. Papa stays in this exact kneeling spot throughout the entire 15s. @Sara already kneeling on both knees in the sand in the CENTER directly beside the castle wall right next to Papa, holding a small yellow plastic bucket of dry sand softly in both hands at her chest. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible at all times. Sara stays in this exact kneeling spot throughout the entire 15s. @Eva already kneeling on both knees in the sand on the RIGHT directly beside the moat right next to Sara, both hands softly resting in the moat-shaped depression in front of her. Curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible at all times. Eva stays in this exact kneeling spot throughout the entire 15s. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa softly pats sand against the wall with both hands. Sara softly tilts her bucket and pours a tiny stream of dry sand onto the wall in front of Papa, both her hands staying on the bucket. Eva softly digs in the moat with both her hands. Each character stays kneeling in their exact spot throughout. Papa (warm cheerful sing-song dad-voice): "Big walls comin' up!" Sara (cheerful kid-voice): "Smooth them down!" Eva (cheerful giggle): "Bigger moat!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva stays kneeling in her exact same spot beside the moat. Both her hands lift up softly together holding a small empty plastic bucket she had on the sand beside her. With both hands on the bucket, Eva pretends to dump it into the moat — but tips it the wrong direction softly, deadpan, looking at her own bucket with cute confusion. Sara stays kneeling in her exact same spot, hands still softly on her bucket of sand. Papa stays kneeling in his exact same spot, hands gently lifting up off the wall in a comic 'hey what gives' shrug-gesture, palms up, both hands visible. Eva (cute deadpan, looking at her empty bucket): "...wrong moat." Papa (warm theatrical comic gasp from his locked spot, hands still up in a shrug): "Oh, is THAT how it is?!" Sara giggles softly with both hands still on her bucket. (BEAT 3 — 10-15s) All three stay kneeling in their exact same spots. A small thin twig with a tiny rectangular paper flag reading 'RESCUE' is already softly planted at the very top of the castle wall directly in front of all three. Papa softly raises both his hands in a celebration gesture, hands open, both visible. Sara softly raises both her hands above her bucket in cheering pose. Eva softly raises both her hands above her empty bucket in cheering pose. All three giggling warmly, all three still kneeling in their exact same spots. Eva (cheerful warm voice, both hands up cheering): "PHASE ONE — DONE!" Cheerful warm kid-show family-comedy lighting throughout, soft and golden. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing of facial features, no shifting of hair or wardrobe, no color drift on clothing or skin tone. Keep all character bodies stable, consistent in scale, and locked to the same outfit and hairstyle from second 0 through the final second. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Each character stays kneeling on both knees in their exact same physical spot from second 0 through second 15 — no standing up, no walking, no crossing positions, no reaching across to other characters. The sand and castle stay plain clean — no marks, no spills, no debris.
